title: papaver nudicaule var. pyrenaicum
intro: Papaver nudicaule var. pyrenaicum, also known as Pyrenean poppy, is a flowering plant species belonging to the poppy family (Papaveraceae). It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of consuming or applying this plant include relieving pain, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular remedy for skin conditions and minor injuries. Pyrenean poppy can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
